prerequisites.value: Balor Whip, Weapon Focus ( whip ), Whip Mastery, base attack bonus +12.

description.value: **Benefit:** When you succeed at a drag attempt with your whip against a non-adjacent target and the target ends the drag adjacent to you, as a free action you can make a single attack against the target at your highest attack bonus using the melee weapon held in your other hand. You gain an additional +2 bonus on drag combat maneuver checks when using a whip to drag, but this bonus does not stack with the bonus from Greater Drag.
